title: SpaceX Valuation Could Put Company in Top Seven by Market Cap
sentences: SpaceX Valuation Could Put Company in Top Seven by Market Cap $1.75 trillion That is the valuation being considered by SpaceX in its blockbuster initial public offering planned for next week.
That number could change a lot in coming days, but if it holds it would make Elon Musk’s rocket maker the seventh-largest U.
